memberdef.argsstring: (const DoubleTab &indicatrice, const DoubleTab &indicatrice_faces, const IntTab &face_voisins, const Domaine_VF &domaine_vf, const DoubleTab &interfacial_area, const DoubleTab &normale_elements, const int face, const int dim)
memberdef.name: calculer_indicatrice_face_based_on_ai

memberdef.argsstring: (const DoubleTab &indicatrice, const IntTab &face_voisins, const int num_face)
memberdef.name: calculer_indicatrice_face_privilegie_pure

memberdef.argsstring: (const int elem, const int num_face, const double indic, const int normale_sortante_au_domaine, const Domaine_VF &domVF, const Maillage_FT_Disc &maillage)
memberdef.name: compute_indic_ghost

memberdef.argsstring: (const int elem, const Maillage_FT_Disc &mesh, Vecteur3 &normale, Vecteur3 &bary_facettes_dans_elem, double &surface_tot)
memberdef.name: compute_normale_barycenter_area_in_cell

memberdef.argsstring: (const int num_face, const Maillage_FT_Disc &maillage, const Domaine_VF &zvf, const IntTab &face_voisins, const DoubleTab &indicatrice, const bool privilegie_pure, double &indic_face)
memberdef.name: correct_indicatrice_face_bord

memberdef.argsstring: (const Domaine_dis_base &domaine_dis_base, const Fluide_Diphasique &fluide, const DoubleVect &indicatrice_elem, DoubleVect &rho_elem, DoubleVect &nu_elem, DoubleVect &mu_elem, DoubleVect &rho_faces)
memberdef.name: FT_disc_calculer_champs_rho_mu_nu_dipha

briefdescription.para: Calcul de champ_rho_faces_ et champ_rho_elem_ en fonction de l'indicatrice: rho_elem_ = indicatrice * ( rho(phase_1) - rho(phase_0) ) + rho(phase_0)

detaileddescription.para: rho_faces_ = 0.5 * (rho_elem(voisin_0) + rho_elem(voisin_1)) Le calcul des viscosites cinematique et dynamique est pour l'instant le suivant: nu_elem = indicatrice * ( nu(phase_1) - nu(phase_0) ) + nu(phase_0) mu_elem = nu_elem * rho_elem

memberdef.argsstring: (const Domaine_dis_base &zdis, const Fluide_Incompressible &fluide, Champ_Fonc_base &champ_rho_elem_, Champ_Don_base &champ_mu_, Champ_Don_base &champ_nu_, Champ_Fonc_base &champ_rho_faces)
memberdef.name: FT_disc_calculer_champs_rho_mu_nu_mono

memberdef.argsstring: (const int num_face, const int elem, const IntTab &elem_faces)
memberdef.name: get_num_face_den_face
